reason: Enabling Certmap in SSSD involves modifying the core authentication configuration (/etc/sssd/sssd.conf) with specific mapping rules. Incorrect syntax or incorrect mapping rules can lead to immediate authentication failure for users or groups, potentially locking out administrators or breaking critical service access.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Incorrect sssd.conf syntax can prevent SSSD from starting; Incorrect certmap rules can cause authentication denial for valid users; Changes impact identity and access management (IAM) functionality
